item.name: Clockwork Novus D
item.description:
Deftly driven by an unspecified (but doubtless incomparably brilliant) man.

Use item to acquire the clockwork Novus D minion.
item.tooltip:
I must settle for crushing
the ironmen's toys.
   - Sadu
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases movement speed of all allies within range by 35%.
Duration: 6s
